query:
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS cfv_filter_idx ON custom_field_values (tenantId, fieldId, value(255));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS cfv_entity_field_idx ON custom_field_values (tenantId, entityType, fieldId, value(255));
